message:
Command `
# DRT3 running well! OpenROAD at 315% CPU, LibreLane reading, pipe empty = healthy.
# Monitor with 2-minute intervals and check step log for routing iteration messages.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 120
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break
    
    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt3_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    
    # Check step 72 log for new messages
    STEP72_LINES=$(wc -l < "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null)
    STEP72_MSG=$(grep -v "^$" "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT72=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B STEP72_LINES=$STEP72_LINES DRT=$DRT72 FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP | $STEP72_MSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "
# DRT3 running well! OpenROAD at 315% CPU, LibreLane reading, pipe empty = healthy.
# Monitor with 2-minute intervals and check step log for routing iteration messages.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 120
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break
    
    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt3_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    
    # Check step 72 log for new messages
    STEP72_LINES=$(wc -l < "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null)
    STEP72_MSG=$(grep -v "^$" "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT72=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B STEP72_LINES=$STEP72_LINES DRT=$DRT72 FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP | $STEP72_MSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
" timed out
